name: WorkWave-Mobile-AI-Tools
description: WorkWave mobile AI tools and plugins

plugins.name: mobile-workflow
plugins.description: Validates and generates iOS storyboards and Android layouts.

plugins.name: ww-mobile-ai-test-agent
plugins.description: Automated QA testing agent for WorkWave mobile apps (PestPac, RealGreen, WinTeam, RouteManager). Ticket-driven tests, POM generation, manual test automation, and regression testing on Android and iOS.
